Tidy eval helpers

Source: R/utils-tidy-eval.R
tidyeval.Rd

The .data pronoun is reexported from rlang. It represents the current slice of data inside data-masking verbs; if you have a column name stored in a string, use .data[["var"]] to refer to that column. See the rlang reference for details.

Developed by Jeffrey Girard.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
